evidence.source_title: List of people assassinated by the People's Mojahedin of Iran — Wikipedia
evidence.description: Qoddousi was assassinated by a bombing at his office on 5 September 1981, attributed to the Mojahedin-e Khalq.

editorial_notes: Assassination by MEK bombing. Using subject-of rather than named-in since he was a target/victim of MEK operations.
